# misp_role (Resource)

A MISP role. Controls what actions users assigned to this role may perform. The `permission` field ("0"–"3") governs the five derived publish/modify flags; all other `perm_*` flags are independent and persisted as set.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_role" "analyst" {
  name       = "Analyst"
  permission = "2" # add + modify + modify_org

  perm_tagger        = true
  perm_sharing_group = true
  perm_sighting      = true
  perm_template      = false
  perm_sync          = false
  perm_admin         = false
  perm_site_admin    = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Role name. Must be unique within the MISP instance.
- `permission` (String) Base permission level: "0"=read-only, "1"=add, "2"=add+modify, "3"=add+modify+publish+delegate. Controls the five derived perm_add/perm_modify/perm_modify_org/perm_publish/perm_delegate flags.

### Optional

- `default_role` (Boolean) Make this the default role for new users.
- `enforce_rate_limit` (Boolean) Enable rate limiting for users with this role.
- `max_execution_time` (String) PHP max_execution_time for users in this role (seconds as string). Empty string means no override.
- `memory_limit` (String) PHP memory limit for users in this role (e.g. "512M"). Empty string means no override.
- `perm_admin` (Boolean) Allow organisation-admin actions.
- `perm_audit` (Boolean) Allow access to the audit log.
- `perm_auth` (Boolean) Allow use of authentication keys.
- `perm_decaying` (Boolean) Allow managing decaying models.
- `perm_galaxy_editor` (Boolean) Allow editing galaxies and clusters.
- `perm_object_template` (Boolean) Allow managing object templates.
- `perm_publish_kafka` (Boolean) Allow publishing to the Kafka feed.
- `perm_publish_zmq` (Boolean) Allow publishing to the ZMQ feed.
- `perm_regexp_access` (Boolean) Allow use of regular-expression clean-up tools.
- `perm_sharing_group` (Boolean) Allow managing sharing groups.
- `perm_sighting` (Boolean) Allow sighting.
- `perm_site_admin` (Boolean) Grant site-admin privileges.
- `perm_sync` (Boolean) Allow synchronisation actions.
- `perm_tag_editor` (Boolean) Allow creating and editing tags.
- `perm_tagger` (Boolean) Allow tagging events/attributes.
- `perm_template` (Boolean) Allow managing event templates.
- `rate_limit_count` (String) API requests allowed per rate-limit window (numeric string).
- `restricted_to_site_admin` (Boolean) Restrict membership of this role to site admins only.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.
- `perm_add` (Boolean) Computed from permission>=1. Do not set directly.
- `perm_delegate` (Boolean) Computed from permission>=3. Do not set directly.
- `perm_modify` (Boolean) Computed from permission>=2. Do not set directly.
- `perm_modify_org` (Boolean) Computed from permission>=2. Do not set directly.
- `perm_publish` (Boolean) Computed from permission>=3. Do not set directly.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import an existing MISP role by its numeric id.
terraform import misp_role.analyst 5
```
